Metadata.title: Durgai Hruday Prathisthan — Heart Care for Children
Metadata.description: Free heart checkups and life-saving surgeries for children aged 0–13 in need. Donate today and give a child a healthy heartbeat.

medicalDisclaimer.title: Medical Disclaimer:
medicalDisclaimer.body: Information on this website is provided for general awareness only and does not constitute medical advice. For any medical emergency, please contact a qualified healthcare professional or dial 108 immediately.

ImpactStats.description: Every figure represents a child who received care, a family that found hope, and a community that came together.

quote.text: No child should die from a heart condition that could have been treated.
quote.author: — Rajendra Shinde , Founder

About.paragraph1: Founded in 2020, Durgai Hruday Prathisthan is a registered NGO dedicated to ensuring that no family in Maharashtra loses a child to a congenital or acquired heart condition due to lack of money.
About.paragraph2: We organise free mass cardiac screening camps in rural areas, connect diagnosed children with empanelled hospitals, and fund partial or complete surgical costs — all through the generosity of donors like you.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.body: Provide free cardiac care to underprivileged children (0–13) across Maharashtra.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.body: A Maharashtra where no child dies from a preventable heart condition.

values.zeroCost: Zero cost to every patient family — always
values.privacy: Child privacy protected — all stories with full consent

Stories.description: Behind every donation is a real child, a real family, and a real miracle.
Stories.consentNote: All stories are shared with written consent from guardians. Child identities are partially anonymised for privacy.

HowYouCanHelp.description: Whether you need our help, want to give, or want to serve — there's a place for you in our mission.

need-help.title: Need a Free Heart Checkup?
need-help.description: If your child (0–13 yrs) shows symptoms or has been diagnosed with a heart condition, apply for free cardiac screening at our next camp. No paperwork, no cost.

donate.title: Fund a Surgery, Save a Life
donate.description: Your donation of ₹500 covers a full checkup. ₹2,000 funds medication. ₹50,000 sponsors a life-saving surgery for a child in need.

volunteer.title: Volunteer or Partner with Us
volunteer.description: Join as a volunteer, host a health camp, or partner through your company's CSR program under Schedule VII. Together we can reach more children.

Transparency.description: We publish quarterly fund utilisation reports. 85 paise of every rupee directly reaches a patient. No financial secrets — ever.

medical.label: Medical & Surgical Care
medical.description: Direct patient: surgery costs, medicines, post-op care

camps.label: Camps & Outreach
camps.description: Health camp logistics, travel, equipment, staff

admin.label: Admin & Overhead
admin.description: Staff, office, compliance, reporting — industry min.

summary.title: 85% reaches patients directly
summary.body: Industry benchmark: 70%. We exceed it by 15 points.

promise.title: Our Promise to You
items: 80G certificate by email for tax filing

Donation.description: 100% online. Instant 80G receipt. Your donation is tax-deductible under Section 80G of the Income Tax Act.

impact.tests: Pays for an ECG + echo for 5 children
impact.workup: Sponsors diagnostic workup for a complex case

Donation.paymentMethods: UPI · Net Banking · Credit / Debit Card · Wallets · International Cards

ContactSection.heading: Need Help? Reach Us Directly
ContactSection.description: For support, partnership, or camp-related queries, connect with us on WhatsApp, call, or email and our team will assist you.

meta.title: Privacy Policy | Durgai Hruday Prathisthan
meta.description: How Durgai Hruday Prathisthan collects, uses and protects your personal data.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: We respect your privacy and are committed to protecting personal data shared by donors, volunteers and families seeking support.

collection.title: 1) Information we collect
collection.body: We may collect your name, phone number, email, donation details and any information submitted through forms or support requests.

usage.title: 2) How we use information
usage.body: We use your data to process donations, issue receipts, coordinate support, send impact updates and improve our services.

sharing.title: 3) Data sharing and security
sharing.body: We do not sell personal data. Information is shared only with trusted service providers (for payment, communication or compliance) and protected through reasonable security measures.

rights.title: 4) Your rights
rights.body: You may request data correction, deletion or communication preference changes at any time by contacting us.

privacy.contact: For privacy-related questions, write to help@durgaihruday.org.

meta.title: Terms & Conditions | Durgai Hruday Prathisthan
meta.description: Terms governing donations, website usage and services offered by Durgai Hruday Prathisthan.

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.intro: By using this website or donating through it, you agree to the terms below.

acceptance.title: 1) Acceptance of terms
acceptance.body: Use of this website confirms that you accept these terms and all applicable laws.

services.title: 2) Nature of services
services.body: The organisation provides charitable support for paediatric heart care subject to medical review, eligibility and available funds.

payments.title: 3) Donations and receipts
payments.body: All donations are voluntary. Tax receipts are issued as per applicable law and on successful payment confirmation.

liability.title: 4) Liability limitation
liability.body: Website content is for general information and cannot replace professional medical advice. The organisation is not liable for decisions taken solely on website content.

terms.contact: For questions about these terms, contact help@durgaihruday.org.

meta.title: Refund Policy | Durgai Hruday Prathisthan
meta.description: Refund policy for donations made to Durgai Hruday Prathisthan.

refund.title: Refund Policy
refund.intro: Donations are generally treated as final and used quickly for patient care. Refunds are considered only in exceptional situations.

eligibility.title: 1) Refund eligibility
eligibility.body: Refunds may be reviewed for duplicate transactions, technical errors or unauthorised payments reported promptly.

process.title: 2) How to request
process.body: Send your request with payment reference, date, amount and reason to help@durgaihruday.org from your registered email.

timeline.title: 3) Review timeline
timeline.body: Verified requests are usually processed within 7–10 working days through the original payment method.

exceptions.title: 4) Non-refundable cases
exceptions.body: Donations already allocated to treatment, camp operations or committed medical expenses may not be refundable.

refund.contact: For refund assistance, write to help@durgaihruday.org with your transaction details.
